description: Per-spec execution result emitted by each spec's pipeline slot inside workflows/execute-specs.js

pipeline_gate.description: Overall outcome of this spec's pipeline

verdict.description: Specific terminal state: IMPLEMENTED on full success; *_FAIL on the blocking stage; ESCALATE on secret/critical escalation

summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the outcome

files_changed.description: Files modified during this spec's pipeline

blocking_stage.description: The pipeline stage that caused a BLOCK (absent on PASS)
